ab: ramas mamu? rasun mini matisal ci nannabkis ni sinsi’ soni’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: ho’ wa, mamaha ta makakaṟal ci ke’ na Itaṟal ci ka nanabkis.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說泰雅語。

ab: patehuk ta haṟi’ la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: patehuk ta haṟi la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: nel min matox sinang la tas.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: talagay mamu kinramasan, ba’ mamu’ kumaṟal ci ke’ na Itaṟal.
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:You guys speak Atayal! That’s great!

ab: ramas mamu? rarasun mu cimu cika atu’ na tuṟakis kira’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: sinsi’, ho’.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: iya’ ṟungi’ ci angaya’, awah matikaluw sani.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ho’, masmasu’ min magal ci angaya’ la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: ini’ ta’ tehuk na?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini’ na? tuhya’ na wa.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: usa’ puse’ ci use’.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: ho’ maha’ cu puse’ ci use’.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: usa’ magal ci sasecuw kabahni’.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: ho’, maha’ cu sumecuw ci kabahni’.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ramas mamu? mamaha’ ta’ ci ka tonguyen kira’
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: talagay kinramasan, payo ta inu’ musa aṟ?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: patapanga’ ta’ ci basu’ musa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: awah matakaluw sani, pabiniy ta’ ci kipu’.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: ho’.
en: B: Yes.

ab: taxi’, kakabahni’ ka nel galeng, bukuy haca ga kukuya’.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: mangungu’ cu caṟung ci kuya’ kung sinsi’.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: eṟi nak ga, usa’ matox ci kabahni’ isu’.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: utux wagi’ la ga, awah masasli’ sani kay.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: bahbah su’ sinsi’.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: amol intaxan su’ soni’?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: payux ka kuya’ lu kabahni’ kintox mu.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: inah haṟi’, mamaha ta’ la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: na’ cu tikiy, nel masauṟiy ka papak mu na.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: pagaluw ta’ musa’ lumanguy aw?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: ho’, hata’ ga!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: talagay ka ci’uli’ nel lumanguy sani.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: ṟaṟik ka use’ saca hiya’, languy ta’ sani’ ita’.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
